name: adt-bare-id-cons-only
code: (define-type (List a) (Nil) (Cons a (List a)))(let ((xs (Cons 1 Nil))) (match xs ((Cons h t) h)))

name: adt-bare-id-cons-then-nil
code: (define-type (List a) (Nil) (Cons a (List a)))(let ((xs (Cons 1 (Cons 2 Nil)))) (match xs ((Cons h t) h) (Nil 0)))

name: adt-exhaustive-either
code: (define-type (Either a b) (Left a) (Right b)) (let ((x (Left 1))) (match x ((Left v) v) ((Right v) 0)))

name: adt-exhaustive-list
code: (define-type (List a) (Nil) (Cons a (List a)))(let ((xs (Cons 1 (Cons 2 (Cons 3 Nil)))))(match xs ((Cons h t) (display (+ h 1))) ((Nil) 0)))

name: adt-exhaustive-nested
code: (begin (define-type (Option a) (Some a) (None))(define-type (Result e v) (Ok v) (Err e))(let ((x (Ok (Some 42)))) (match x ((Ok y) (match y ((Some v) v) ((None) 0))) ((Err _) 0))))

name: adt-exhaustive-pair
code: (define-type (Pair a b) (MkPair a b))(let ((p (MkPair 1 2)))(match p ((MkPair x y) (+ x y))))

name: adt-exhaustive-triple
code: (define-type (Triple a b c) (MkTriple a b c))(let ((t (MkTriple 1 2 3)))(match t ((MkTriple x y z) (+ x (+ y z)))))
